# FAR Google CONFLICTS boundary dev import

This directory is a deterministic 150-item development diagnostic for WS3. It is not an official test run, human IAA, or publication gold created by FAR.

- Source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/google-research-datasets/rag_conflicts/81ba921dd684a93db41a7e9dda6b6a7c67348a88/conflicts.jsonl
- Dataset license: Apache-2.0
- Sampling seed: 2718
- Held-out/test access: false
